description.value:
Summoner Exclusive. Broadcast your pneuma across the planar barrier to call a daemon whose nature resonates with your Primary Resonance.

Choose the Tier of daemon you wish to summon and spend Energy equal to its cost. The daemon appears in an unoccupied space within 30 ft. Daemons are not compelled — they arrive because your pneuma resonates with them.

Energy Spent by Tier

TierEnergy Cost
1/41
1/22
13
24
35
46

Tier Gap Penalty: For each Tier the daemon exceeds your current Tier, add +1 to both dice on the weaving roll.

Summoning Limit: You may have summoned daemons with combined Tier ≤ your Charisma simultaneously. Summoning beyond this limit immediately dismisses the oldest summoned daemon.

Dismissal: Dismiss any summoned daemon as a [Free] action at any time.

Targeting Success

  • 0 successes: Connection collapses. Energy is spent; no daemon arrives. On a critical failure (double 8s), something briefly crosses over on its own terms (GM discretion).
  • 1 success: Arrives Indifferent. Follows simple instructions that don't conflict with its nature. Complex commands require a basic Empathy check.
  • 2 successes: Arrives Cooperative. Follows instructions within its capability; may specify a daemon category from your accessible types.
  • 3 successes: Arrives Friendly. Actively fulfills your intent; may describe specific characteristics and GM honors reasonable requests.

system.effect: Summon a daemon of chosen Tier whose nature resonates with your Primary Resonance. Energy cost scales with Tier (1–6). Disposition determined by targeting roll.
system.weavingRoll: Primary Potential + Primary Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
